rows.current_proxy_state: current proxy solver is 3D on a 48^3 grid
rows.official_reference: public tutorial is a 2D duct/flap case
rows.why_blocks_fluent_equivalence: 3D proxy dynamics and section averaging are not the official 2D formulation

rows.current_proxy_state: procedural duct/flap particles and static LBM duct geometry are used
rows.official_reference: Fluent tutorial uses its mesh and intrinsic FSI setup
rows.why_blocks_fluent_equivalence: the committed proxy does not import or reproduce the official mesh

rows.current_proxy_state: current MPM stress path remains the existing corotated/hyperelastic implementation
rows.official_reference: official structural model is linear elasticity
rows.why_blocks_fluent_equivalence: material parameters are mapped, but the constitutive update is not the Fluent structural model

rows.current_proxy_state: current LBM geometry is static duct walls plus MPM moving-boundary coupling
rows.official_reference: official transient uses Fluent dynamic mesh with two-way FSI
rows.why_blocks_fluent_equivalence: dynamic mesh deformation is not reproduced

rows.current_proxy_state: current output is the mean displacement of the free-tip proxy particle mask
rows.official_reference: official monitor is structural-point total displacement near the flap tip
rows.why_blocks_fluent_equivalence: the committed monitor is not the same point, interpolation, or averaging definition

rows.current_proxy_state: target_u_lbm=[0.02,0,0] maps to about 0.0833333333 m/s for this proxy scale
rows.why_blocks_fluent_equivalence: the current proxy inlet speed is not dimensionally equal to the official inlet speed

rows.current_proxy_state: current solver uses the existing single-phase LBM setup and parameters
rows.official_reference: official run uses Fluent fluid-model settings
rows.why_blocks_fluent_equivalence: fluid-model and solver numerics are not matched

rows.current_proxy_state: current Step105 transient starts from the initialized quiescent LBM field
rows.official_reference: official transient starts from a steady fluid-flow pre-solve
rows.why_blocks_fluent_equivalence: the transient initial flow field is not the official steady preflow state
